mapper.select: SELECT r.*, rs.id AS rs_id, rs.recipe_id AS rs_recipe_id, rs.step_order AS rs_step_order, rs.step_time AS rs_step_time, rs.content AS rs_content FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN recipe_order ro ON ro.recipe_id = r.id AND ro.category COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci = r.category LEFT JOIN recipe_step rs ON rs.recipe_id = r.id ORDER BY r.category ASC, COALESCE(ro.position, 999999) ASC, r.menu_name ASC, rs.step_order ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO recipe_order (category, recipe_id, position) VALUES
(#{catKey}, #{item.id}, #{item.sortOrder})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE position = VALUES(position)
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, rs.id AS rs_id, rs.recipe_id AS rs_recipe_id, rs.step_order AS rs_step_order, rs.step_time AS rs_step_time, rs.content AS rs_content FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN recipe_step rs ON rs.recipe_id = r.id WHERE r.id = #{id} ORDER BY rs.step_order ASC

SELECT r.*, rs.id AS rs_id, rs.recipe_id AS rs_recipe_id, rs.step_order AS rs_step_order, rs.step_time AS rs_step_time, rs.content AS rs_content FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN recipe_step rs ON rs.recipe_id = r.id LEFT JOIN favorite_order fo ON fo.recipe_id = r.id WHERE r.visible = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(fo.position, 999999) ASC, r.updated_at DESC, rs.step_order ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO favorite_order (recipe_id, position) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.position})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE position = VALUES(position)
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, rs.id AS rs_id, rs.recipe_id AS rs_recipe_id, rs.step_order AS rs_step_order, rs.step_time AS rs_step_time, rs.content AS rs_content FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN recipe_step rs ON rs.recipe_id = r.id WHERE r.visible = 1 ORDER BY r.updated_at DESC, rs.step_order ASC

SELECT r.*, rs.id AS rs_id, rs.recipe_id AS rs_recipe_id, rs.step_order AS rs_step_order, rs.step_time AS rs_step_time, rs.content AS rs_content FROM recipe r LEFT JOIN recipe_step rs ON rs.recipe_id = r.id WHERE r.template = 1 ORDER BY r.category ASC, r.menu_name ASC, rs.step_order ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE recipe SET visible = #{visible} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE recipe SET template = #{template} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe (menu_name, author, description, imgname, visible, template, use_blender, temperature, cup_size, category, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{menuName}, #{author}, #{description}, #{imgname}, #{visible}, #{template}, #{useBlender}, #{temperature, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{cupSize, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{category, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE recipe SET menu_name = #{menuName}, author = #{author}, description = #{description}, imgname = #{imgname}, visible = #{visible}, template = #{template}, use_blender = #{useBlender}, temperature = #{temperature, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, cup_size = #{cupSize, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, category = #{category, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe_step (recipe_id, step_order, step_time, content) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{stepOrder}, #{stepTime}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM recipe_step WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY step_order ASC
SELECT category_name, sort_order FROM recipe_category_order ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO recipe_category_order (category_name, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.categoryName}, #{item.sortOrder})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sort_order = VALUES(sort_order)
